events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"pass\",
  \"risk\": \"low\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [],
  \"percent_complete\": 90,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.93,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Neutral and equipment grounding conductors are isolated on separate bars with the bonding screw not installed.\",
    \"Each breaker terminal contains only one conductor.\",
    \"Unused knockout openings are closed.\",
    \"Panel directory is typed and affixed to the door.\",
    \"Required working space in front of the panel is unobstructed.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Leave the green bonding screw out of the subpanel unless manufacturer instructions and the service configuration require bonding at that enclosure.\",
    \"Verify final torque values and reinstall the deadfront before acceptance.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed subpanel makeup is consistent with a feeder-supplied residential panel: neutrals are isolated from equipment grounds, the enclosure is not bonded by the green screw, breaker terminals are not double-lugged, openings are closed, the circuit directory is present, and access clearance is maintained. At rough-complete, this should pass subject to normal final torque and cover installation checks.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC 250.32(B)\",
    \"NEC 408.3(D)\",
    \"NEC 408.4(A)\",
    \"NEC 408.7\"
  ]
}
EOF
jq . /app/answer.json"
→ /app
/bin/sh: 35: jq: not found
